result.text: {"answer_label":"exclude-first-consolidation","answer":"Keep the first consolidation limited to Brigade, GraphTrail, and MiseLedger. Pantry adds browser-state storage, shared secrets, AES-GCM, and security coverage absent from Brigade at the decision point; agent-notify is an independent opt-in Go adapter.","contradiction_caught":null,"contradiction_explanation":"","minority_finding":"Pantry may invoke agent-notify for expiry alerts, but the integration is optional and does not require shared source consolidation.","evidence":["The first consolidation is defined as Brigade's Python control plane plus GraphTrail and MiseLedger.","Optional manifest-managed installation can provide both components without importing their source."]}
